trades.market: Will CPI rise more than 0.4% in April 2026?
trades.catalyst: Upcoming CPI data release showing persistent inflation pressures
trades.risk_notes: Unexpected disinflationary data could lower CPI growth

trades.market: Will real GDP increase by more than 1.5% in Q1 2026?
trades.catalyst: Strong consumer spending and labor market data
trades.risk_notes: Potential slowdown in global demand could impact GDP

trades.market: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates before 2027?
trades.catalyst: Persistent inflation reducing likelihood of rate cuts
trades.risk_notes: Unexpected economic slowdown could force Fed to cut rates

avoid.market: Ethereum price at Apr 10, 2026 at 5pm EDT ($2,250 to 2,289.99)
avoid.reason: High volatility and lack of reliable predictive data for crypto price ranges

avoid.market: Will the high temp in Chicago be 52-53° on Apr 10, 2026?
avoid.reason: Insufficient long-term weather forecast data for precise temperature range

notes: Current macro environment suggests an inflationary regime with persistent price pressures and a hawkish Fed stance. Focus on inflation and GDP-related markets for high-conviction trades, while avoiding volatile or unpredictable categories like crypto and weather without strong grounding data.
